title: Third-party asset manifest
description: Inventory of every redistributable third-party asset under app/Assets/ThirdParty (Angle Reconstruction V2 plan section 11). Every file under ThirdParty (except manifest.json and Unity *.meta files) must be owned by exactly one entry's path. License allowlist, checksum agreement, ownership coverage, and attribution generability are enforced by scripts/validate_assets.py because JSON Schema cannot express them. docs/assets/THIRD_PARTY_ASSETS.md is generated from this manifest by scripts/generate_attribution.py and never hand-maintained.

path.description: Directory (relative to app/) owning this asset's files.

sourceUrl.description: The listing/landing page for the asset.

license.description: SPDX-style identifier; must be on the validator allowlist (CC0-1.0, CC-BY-3.0, CC-BY-4.0).

modifications.description: Non-empty when modified is true; empty string otherwise.

sha256.description: Deterministic content digest of all non-*.meta files under path: sha256 over (posix relpath + NUL + file sha256 digest) for each file in sorted relpath order. Recompute with scripts/validate_assets.py --print-sha.

downloadUrl.description: The exact URL(s) fetched on acquisition day. Recorded before import (plan section 16).

downloadSha256.description: sha256 of the downloaded file, or of the sorted concatenation manifest archived in licenseEvidence when the acquisition was multiple files.

licenseEvidence.description: Repo-relative path to the archived license metadata as seen on acquisition day (plan section 18).
